scenes.description: 黄色小熊站在木屋前,表情从疑惑转为惊讶。屏幕上出现文字提示豌豆藤蔓突然变大,镜头转向缠绕在房屋上的巨大藤蔓,上面有猫、兔子和昆虫。
scenes.video_prompt: A cheerful yellow cartoon bear stands in front of a rustic orange wooden house, looking confused before widening its eyes in shock. The camera slowly zooms in on the bear as text appears: 'The pea vine suddenly grew!' Cut to a wide-angle view revealing a massive green pea vine spiraling up the house, with a brown cat, gray rabbit, and green insect clinging to it. Bright daylight illuminates the lush garden filled with shrubs and flowers. Animated style with soft outlines, vibrant colors, and gentle motion blur. Camera pans upward along the vine. 4K resolution, 24fps, warm natural lighting.

style_elements.characters: Expressive cartoon animals: yellow bear in blue shirt, brown cat, gray rabbit, green insect
style_elements.environment: Sunny outdoor garden with wooden house, greenery, and climbing pea vine
style_elements.visual_style: Colorful children's animation with soft shading and playful design

scenes.description: 小兔子闭眼微笑,老鼠面露担忧,小熊震惊地看着藤蔓。老鼠决定行动,准备处理危机。
scenes.video_prompt: Close-up shots of three animal friends reacting to the giant pea vine. A small rabbit with a blue bowtie smiles peacefully, eyes closed, while a red-hatted mouse in blue overalls looks anxious, clutching its chest. Beside them, the blue-shirted bear gasps in surprise. The scene cuts between expressive faces under soft sunlight. Background shows the vine wrapping around the porch column. Warm color palette with sky blue, grass green, and house orange. Smooth frame transitions with subtle eye blinks and ear twitches. Gentle tracking shot moves left to right across characters. 4K UHD, 25fps, animated realism for children’s storytelling.

style_elements.characters: Rabbit with bowtie, mouse in red hat and blue overalls, bear in blue shirt
style_elements.environment: Front porch of orange house with vine-wrapped column and garden backdrop
style_elements.visual_style: Soft-edged cartoon style with emotional facial expressions

scenes.description: 果园中,小兔子拿着黄色绳子,小熊品尝植物茎,周围是南瓜、白菜和果树,展现农场生活的乐趣。
scenes.video_prompt: Wide daytime shot of a lively orchard: rows of pumpkins, cabbages, apple trees, and flowering vines. The blue-overalled rabbit holds a bright yellow rope, inspecting it thoughtfully. Nearby, the bear chews on a green plant stem, nodding approvingly. Wooden fence lines the background with a purple-roofed shed visible. Sunlight dapples through leaves, casting playful shadows. Characters move with bouncy, exaggerated animations. Over-the-shoulder shot follows the rabbit, then switches to low-angle view of the bear. 4K resolution, 24fps, vivid saturation, hand-drawn texture overlay.

style_elements.characters: Rabbit in blue overalls holding rope, bear tasting plant
style_elements.environment: Bustling farm orchard with vegetables, fruit trees, and wooden structures
style_elements.visual_style: Whimsical farm-themed animation with rich textures

scenes.description: 老鼠决定去救藤蔓上的小动物,鼓励大家合作解决问题,传递团结与勇气的信息。
scenes.video_prompt: Determined mouse steps forward, raising a tiny fist. Voiceover says: 'We can solve this together!' Other animals gather around—bear nods, rabbit opens eyes with renewed hope. The camera circles the group in a heroic slow-motion sequence. Mouse points toward the towering vine. Cut to dynamic side view of the vine scaling the roof, emphasizing height and danger. Sky turns slightly golden, enhancing drama. Soft orchestral music swells. Animated expressions show courage and unity. Medium-wide shot with circular dolly movement. 4K, 25fps, cinematic children’s animation style with emotional depth.

style_elements.characters: Mouse leading with determination, bear and rabbit showing support
style_elements.environment: Garden base near house with towering pea vine reaching skyward
style_elements.visual_style: Narrative-driven animation with dramatic lighting and pacing
style_elements.camera_movement: Circular dolly around group, cut to side elevation

scenes.description: 角色们合力攀爬藤蔓救援小猫,过程紧张又充满趣味,最终成功将小猫救下。
scenes.video_prompt: Bear and mouse begin climbing the thick, twisting pea vine, gripping tightly. Rabbit secures the yellow rope to a fence post below, acting as anchor. Upward tracking shot follows climbers past leaves and tendrils. On the roof, the cat waves nervously. 'Hold on!' shouts the bear. With a final pull, they reach the top. Bear gently lifts the cat into his arms. Joyful music plays. Wide aerial view shows all four animals reuniting on the ground. Expressive animation with comedic timing—cat giggles, 'We were just playing!' Soft breeze rustles fur. Steadicam follow and crane-up shots. 4K, 24fps, high-detail textures and fluid motion.

style_elements.characters: Bear and mouse climbing, rabbit anchoring rope, cat rescued from roof
style_elements.environment: Vertical climb along vine from ground to rooftop
style_elements.visual_style: Adventure-style animation with humor and suspense
style_elements.camera_movement: Tracking climb, crane-up, and aerial reunion shot

scenes.description: 小猫被救后表示还想再玩,但大家意识到藤蔓仍危险,决定彻底解决隐患。
scenes.video_prompt: After rescue, the cat grins, 'That was fun! Can we go back up?' Others react with disbelief. Bear shakes head: 'Too dangerous!' Rabbit inspects the vine closely, noticing cracks in the wall. Group gathers in serious huddle. Thought bubble appears above rabbit: idea forming. Decision made—they must remove the vine. Determined walk toward tool shed. Comedic moment when mouse trips over a pumpkin. Background shifts from joyful to purposeful tone. Mid-shot group dynamics with cutaways to environment details. 4K, 25fps, expressive lip sync and body language, consistent character design.

style_elements.characters: Cat playful, others concerned and thoughtful
style_elements.environment: Houseyard with cracked wall, tool shed entrance in distance
style_elements.visual_style: Emotionally layered animation blending comedy and concern
style_elements.camera_movement: Group mid-shot with reaction cutaways and path-following

scenes.description: 小动物们前往仓库取工具,准备拆除藤蔓,途中互动生动有趣。
scenes.video_prompt: The team marches toward a red barn-style shed. Rabbit leads with clipboard, bear carries a tiny ladder, mouse drags a toolbox comically larger than itself. Playful banter shown through bouncing movements and ear wiggles. Inside the dimly lit shed, dust floats in sunbeams. Tools hang neatly—ropes, saws, pulleys. Rabbit pulls out a blueprint labeled 'Vine Removal Plan.' Everyone cheers. Mouse finds a mysterious pot labeled 'Special Sauce.' Curious sniff. Cut to blackboard-style diagram of removal strategy. Warm interior lighting, detailed textures. Tracking shot follows entry; static setup inside. 4K, 24fps, cozy workshop aesthetic with educational flair.

style_elements.characters: Team carrying tools, mouse with oversized box, rabbit as planner
style_elements.environment: Wooden tool shed with organized tools and sunlight beams
style_elements.visual_style: Cozy, educational animation with humorous exaggeration
style_elements.camera_movement: Exterior tracking, interior static and cutaway shots

scenes.description: 他们使用工具和创意方法开始拆除藤蔓,过程充满协作与智慧。
scenes.video_prompt: Animals implement their plan: rabbit directs from ground, bear and mouse set up pulley system using the yellow rope. Vine is carefully detached section by section. Each segment falls softly onto a wagon. One slip causes comic bounce—but no harm. Green insect helps untangle knots. Time-lapse effect shows progress under afternoon sun. Celebratory high-fives after each success. Dynamic angles: low to show strength, overhead for coordination. Sound effects of creaking wood and happy grunts. 4K resolution, 25fps, physics-based animation with light slapstick humor.

style_elements.characters: Bear and mouse operating pulley, rabbit directing, insect assisting
style_elements.environment: Yard during active vine removal with wagon and tools
style_elements.visual_style: Collaborative problem-solving animation with real-time physics
style_elements.camera_movement: Low-angle, overhead, and dynamic action cuts

scenes.description: 拆除后的藤蔓被运往垃圾池,但他们决定给豌豆找新家,体现环保意识。
scenes.video_prompt: Wagon loaded with vine segments rolls toward compost bin. But rabbit halts: 'Wait! This is life—we should replant it!' Group agrees. They transfer the vine to a large flowerpot. Bear waters it gently. Rabbit places a sign: 'New Home – Park Garden.' Team pushes pot on a cart toward distant park gate. Scenic route through meadow with butterflies. Sunset hues soften the sky. Emotional warmth in character gestures. Side-scrolling landscape shot with rolling cart. 4K, 24fps, nature-positive message with gentle pacing and blooming visuals.

style_elements.characters: All pushing cart with potted vine, caring expressions
style_elements.environment: Path from yard to park, meadow with wildflowers
style_elements.camera_movement: Side-scrolling follow with scenic wide views

scenes.description: 豌豆藤被送到公园作为盆景,受到其他动物欢迎,成为社区共享景观。
scenes.video_prompt: Arrival at sunny community park. Animals gather around the newly planted pea vine in decorative pot. Squirrel takes photo, birds sing above. Sign reads: 'Grown with Love by Our Heroes.' Children’s drawings taped nearby. Bear blushes proudly. Mouse gives a short speech with a leaf microphone. Rabbit waters vine one last time. Panoramic view reveals picnic areas, swings, and walking paths. Ambient chatter and laughter. Slow zoom-out captures joyous atmosphere. 4K UHD, 25fps, heartwarming public space animation with inclusive themes.

style_elements.characters: Bear, mouse, rabbit presenting vine to crowd
style_elements.environment: Community park with families, playground, and green spaces
style_elements.visual_style: Celebratory public installation with social-emotional learning

scenes.description: 购物归来发现小猫在怀里睡觉,妈妈来寻,大家庆祝并准备豌豆饭,但小猫因经历拒绝食用。
scenes.video_prompt: A shopping bag drops as the mother cat rushes in, relieved to find her kitten sleeping peacefully in the bear’s arms. Tearful reunion. Then, festive mood returns—'Let’s celebrate!' A big pot of steaming green pea rice is served. Everyone claps except the kitten, who hides behind the rabbit, shuddering: 'No more giant peas...' Humorous close-up of untouched bowl. Others laugh kindly. Scene lit with golden indoor glow, kitchen counter with herbs and bowls. Circular table gathering with warm interaction. Close-ups on food and reactions. 4K, 24fps, domestic warmth with gentle comedy.

style_elements.characters: Mother cat reuniting with kitten, others celebrating with food
style_elements.environment: Cozy kitchen with celebration table and cooking pots
style_elements.visual_style: Domestic celebration with emotional and comic moments

scenes.description: 最后举行盛大的豌豆舞会,大家一起跳舞庆祝,结束于欢乐的节日氛围。
scenes.video_prompt: Night falls. String lights twinkle in the garden. Music swells into a joyful dance beat. All animals join the 'Great Pea Dance Party!' Silhouettes hop, spin, and wave under stars. Kitten dances on bear’s shoulders. Confetti shaped like peas rains down. Final group pose with hands raised. Fireflies pulse in rhythm. Wide drone-like spiral shot ascends to show entire celebration below. Text overlay: 'And they lived happily, one vine at a time.' 4K, 25fps, magical night animation with rhythmic editing and holiday spirit.

style_elements.characters: All dancing joyfully, kitten on bear’s shoulders
style_elements.environment: Night garden with fairy lights, confetti, and fireflies
style_elements.visual_style: Festive nighttime celebration with whimsical lighting
style_elements.camera_movement: Spiral ascent and wide celebratory finale shot
